common.accessDeniedTitle: You don't have access to this section
common.accessDeniedDescription: Ask a company owner or manager if you need this permission.
common.name: Name

auth.loginDescription: Welcome back — sign in to your company account.
auth.registerDescription: Set up your workspace in under a minute.
auth.valueProp1: Track products, stock, and sales in one place
auth.valueProp2: Invite your team with role-based permissions
auth.valueProp3: A clear financial picture, always up to date
auth.invalidInviteDescription: This link is missing its invitation token.
auth.acceptInvitationDescription: Set a password to join your company.
auth.checkYourEmailDescription: If an account exists for {{email}}, we've sent a password reset link.
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.invalidResetDescription: This link is missing its reset token.
auth.signInWithNewPassword: Sign in with your new password.
auth.resetPasswordDescription: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.invalidVerificationDescription: This link is missing its verification token.
auth.emailVerifiedDescription: Your email address has been confirmed.

marketing.heroTitle: Manage your business in one place
marketing.heroSubtitle: A simple ERP platform for small and medium businesses

invoice.title: Invoice

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.subtitle: Invoices are generated automatically when a sale is completed.
invoices.emptyDescription: Invoices are generated automatically when a sale is completed — complete a sale to see one here.
invoices.markPaidFailed: Failed to mark invoice as paid

customers.noteHint: e.g. "Received in cash at the shop"
customers.debtReminderMessage:
Hello,
This is a friendly reminder of your balance with {{company}}.
Outstanding amount: {{remaining}}
Thank you for your business.
customers.amountRequired: Enter an amount greater than zero.
customers.amountExceedsRemaining: Amount can't exceed the remaining balance.
customers.title: Customers
customers.subtitle: Manage your customer records.
customers.emptyDescription: Keep track of who you sell to — add a customer to get started.
customers.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone, or email…
customers.deleteCustomerDescription: This will permanently delete "{{name}}". This action cannot be undone.

suppliers.title: Suppliers
suppliers.subtitle: Manage the vendors you buy from.
suppliers.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone or email…
suppliers.createDescription: Add a supplier you purchase goods from.
suppliers.emptyDescription: Keep track of who you buy from — add a supplier to get started.
suppliers.deleteSupplierDescription: This will permanently delete "{{name}}". This action cannot be undone.

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Manage your product catalog.
products.createDescription: Create a new product in your catalog.
products.openingQuantityInvalid: Must be a whole number, zero or greater.
products.openingQuantityHint: Stock to start with — recorded as a purchase movement.
products.emptyDescription: Your catalog is empty — add a product to start tracking stock and selling.
products.newCategoryDescription: Add a category to organize your products.
products.noCategoriesDescription: Create your first category to organize your products.
products.deleteProductDescription: This will permanently delete "{{name}}". This action cannot be undone.
products.importDescription: Bulk-add products from a spreadsheet — supports large catalogs, validates before importing.
products.optionalColumns: Optional: sku, category, unit, openingQuantity, lowStockThreshold, description.
products.showingFirst: Showing the first {{shown}} of {{total}} rows — all {{total}} will be validated and imported.
products.rowPurchasePriceInvalid: Purchase price must be a number ≥ 0.
products.rowSellingPriceInvalid: Selling price must be a number ≥ 0.
products.rowOpeningQuantityInvalid: Opening quantity must be a whole number ≥ 0.
products.rowLowStockInvalid: Low stock threshold must be a whole number ≥ 0.
products.duplicateSku: Duplicate SKU "{{sku}}" elsewhere in this file.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.subtitle: Track stock movements and post manual adjustments.
inventory.emptyDescription: Movements appear here as stock is purchased, sold, or adjusted — post a manual adjustment to get started.
inventory.newAdjustmentDescription: Posts a new movement to the inventory ledger — existing entries can't be edited.
inventory.quantityChangeHint: Negative reduces stock, positive adds to it.

sales.title: Sales
sales.subtitle: Create draft sales and complete them to generate invoices.
sales.emptyDescription: Sales you create here decrement stock and generate invoices once completed.
sales.cancelSaleDescription: This will cancel this draft sale (total {{amount}}). This action cannot be undone.
sales.searchPlaceholder: Search by name or SKU — or scan a barcode
sales.savedAsDraftTitle: Sale saved as draft — completion failed
sales.newSaleDescription: Search or scan a product to add it, then complete the sale.
sales.addProductBeforeSale: Add a product before creating a sale.
sales.cartEmpty: Cart is empty — search above to add products.
sales.estimatedTotalHint: (the server computes the authoritative total from live prices)

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Read-only analytics across sales, products, customers, and inventory.
reports.noSalesInRange: No completed sales in this range
reports.noAttributedSales: No attributed sales in this range
reports.walkInExcluded: Walk-in sales without a customer aren't counted here.
reports.allAboveThreshold: All products are above their threshold.
reports.couldNotLoadDailyClose: Couldn't load the daily close report
reports.cashSalesDescription: Paid in full at time of sale
reports.paymentsCollectedDescription: Includes debt collected from prior sales
reports.noSalesOnDate: No completed sales on this date.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your company information and team members.
settings.inviteTeamToStart: Invite your team to get started.
settings.invitationResentDescription: A new invite link was sent to {{email}}.
settings.inviteMemberDescription: They'll receive an email with a link to join your company.
settings.removeMemberDescription: This will remove {{name}} from your company. They will lose access immediately.
settings.editCompanyDescription: These details apply to your whole company.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information and account security.
profile.emailChangeHint: Contact support to change your email.
profile.fullNameRequired: Full name must be at least 2 characters.
profile.changePasswordDescription: You'll be signed out of every session after changing your password.
profile.passwordChangedDescription: You have been signed out of every session. Please sign in again.

dashboard.allSetUp: You're all set up — nice work getting started.
dashboard.noActivityDescription: Your sales, invoices, customers, and inventory activities will appear here.
dashboard.trendUp: up {{percent}}% on this time last month
dashboard.trendDown: down {{percent}}% on this time last month
dashboard.nothingNeedsAttentionDescription: No low-stock products or overdue invoices right now.
dashboard.alreadyVerifiedDescription: Your email is already verified — refresh to update this banner.
dashboard.verifyEmailMessage: Please verify your email address ({{email}}) to secure your account.

ai.askPlaceholder: Ask about your sales, inventory, products, or customers…
ai.askAiAssistantDescription: Ask about your sales, inventory, products, or customers — it can only see what you have permission to see.
ai.dashboardCardDescription: Get instant answers about your sales, inventory, reports, and overall business performance — right from your dashboard.

comingSoon.heading: This module is under development.
comingSoon.subtext: It will become available in a future update.

returns.description: Process and track returned items from completed sales.
capabilities: Record full or partial sale returns
Automatically restock or write off returned items
Refund or credit the customer's account
Keep a full return history per sale

quotations.description: Create price quotes for customers before they commit to a sale.
capabilities: Draft itemized quotes with custom pricing
Send quotes to customers for approval
Convert an accepted quote into a sale in one click
Track quote expiry and follow-ups

suppliers.description: Manage the vendors you purchase products and materials from.
capabilities: Maintain supplier contact and payment details
Track outstanding balances per supplier
View full purchase history per supplier
Rate and categorize suppliers by reliability

purchaseOrders.description: Create and track orders placed with your suppliers before goods arrive.
capabilities: Draft purchase orders with expected delivery dates
Send orders directly to suppliers
Track order status from draft to received
Convert received orders into purchase invoices

purchaseInvoices.description: Record and manage invoices received from your suppliers.
capabilities: Log supplier invoices against purchase orders
Track payment status and due dates
Automatically update stock on receipt
Generate supplier payment records

supplierPayments.description: Track payments made to suppliers and outstanding balances.
capabilities: Record full or partial supplier payments
View a running ledger per supplier
Get reminders for upcoming due invoices
Export payment history for accounting

categories.description: Organize your product catalog into structured categories.
capabilities: Create nested category hierarchies
Bulk-assign products to categories
Filter reports and catalogs by category
Rename or merge categories safely

inventoryMovements.description: A dedicated, filterable ledger of every stock movement across your business.
capabilities: Filter movements by type, product, or date range
Drill into the source sale, purchase, or adjustment
Export movement history for audits
Spot unusual stock activity at a glance

stockCount.description: Reconcile your physical stock against recorded inventory levels.
capabilities: Schedule periodic stock count sessions
Enter counted quantities by location
Automatically generate adjustment entries for discrepancies
Keep a full audit trail of every count

contacts.description: Manage additional contact people linked to your customers.
capabilities: Add multiple contacts per customer account
Track roles like billing or purchasing contact
Reach contacts directly from a customer's profile
Import contacts in bulk

customerHistory.description: A unified timeline of every interaction across all your customers.
capabilities: Browse sales, payments, and communications in one timeline
Filter history by customer, date, or activity type
Spot buying patterns across your customer base
Export history for reporting

cash.description: Track cash on hand and daily cash movements.
capabilities: Record cash in and cash out entries
Reconcile daily cash drawer totals
Link cash entries to sales and expenses
View your real-time cash position

bankAccounts.description: Manage your company's bank accounts and balances.
capabilities: Track balances across multiple bank accounts
Record deposits, withdrawals, and transfers
Reconcile against bank statements
View account activity over any date range

expenses.description: Record and categorize your business expenses.
capabilities: Log expenses by category and vendor
Attach receipts to expense records
Track recurring expenses automatically
Break down spending in expense reports

revenue.description: Track income across every revenue stream in your business.
capabilities: View revenue broken down by source
Compare revenue across custom date ranges
Link revenue entries to sales and invoices
Export revenue data for accounting

journalEntries.description: Record manual accounting entries for full double-entry bookkeeping.
capabilities: Create balanced debit and credit entries
Post entries to a chart of accounts
Review and approve entries before posting
Generate a general ledger from journal history

employees.description: Manage your team's employee records in one place.
capabilities: Maintain employee profiles and contracts
Track roles, departments, and start dates
Link employees to payroll and attendance
Store employee documents securely

payroll.description: Calculate and process employee pay each period.
capabilities: Run payroll for custom pay periods
Automatically apply deductions and bonuses
Generate payslips for every employee
Export payroll data for accounting

attendance.description: Track employee clock-ins, clock-outs, and work hours.
capabilities: Record daily check-in and check-out times
Flag late arrivals and early departures
Summarize hours worked per pay period
Feed attendance data directly into payroll

leave.description: Manage employee leave requests and balances.
capabilities: Submit and approve leave requests
Track leave balances by type and employee
View a team-wide leave calendar
Set custom leave policies per role

salesReports.description: Deep-dive analytics on sales performance over time.
capabilities: Break down revenue by product, customer, or period
Compare performance across custom date ranges
Spot seasonal sales trends
Export detailed sales reports

inventoryReports.description: Detailed reporting on stock levels, turnover, and value.
capabilities: Track stock value trends over time
Identify slow-moving and fast-moving products
Monitor stockout and overstock risk
Export inventory reports for planning

profitReports.description: Understand true profitability across products and periods.
capabilities: Break down gross margin by product or category
Compare profit across custom date ranges
Factor in cost of goods sold automatically
Export profit reports for stakeholders

customerReports.description: Insights into customer value, retention, and buying behavior.
capabilities: Rank customers by lifetime value
Track repeat purchase rates
Segment customers by behavior or spend
Export customer insights for marketing

financialReports.description: Company-wide financial statements at a glance.
capabilities: Generate profit & loss statements
View balance sheets by period
Track cash flow across the business
Export statements for accountants and investors

company.description: Manage your company's core profile and business details.
capabilities: Update company name, logo, and contact details
Configure business type and industry
Set your default operating country
Manage company-wide branding

users.description: Manage your team's accounts and access.
capabilities: Invite and manage team members
Assign roles to control access
Suspend or remove accounts
Review member activity and login history

rolesPermissions.description: Fine-tune exactly what each role can see and do.
capabilities: Create custom roles beyond the defaults
Toggle permissions per module and action
Preview access as any given role
Audit permission changes over time

taxes.description: Configure tax rates and rules applied to your sales and purchases.
capabilities: Define multiple tax rates and rules
Apply taxes automatically by product or region
Generate tax summary reports
Stay ready for tax filing periods

currencies.description: Manage the currencies your business operates in.
capabilities: Support multiple currencies across sales and purchases
Set and update exchange rates
Choose a default currency per company
View reports converted to a base currency

units.description: Define the units of measure used across your product catalog.
capabilities: Create custom units beyond the built-in defaults
Set conversion rates between related units
Assign default units per product category
Keep inventory counts consistent across units

numbering.description: Customize the numbering format for invoices, orders, and other documents.
capabilities: Set custom prefixes and number sequences
Configure per-document numbering formats
Reset or adjust sequences per fiscal year
Preview generated numbers before saving

integrations.description: Connect Smart ERP with the other tools your business relies on.
capabilities: Connect payment and accounting providers
Sync data with e-commerce platforms
Set up webhooks for custom workflows
Manage API keys for external access

backupRestore.description: Protect your business data with backups you control.
capabilities: Schedule automatic recurring backups
Download on-demand backup snapshots
Restore your company data to a previous point
Review a full history of backup activity

systemPreferences.description: Fine-tune system-wide defaults for how Smart ERP behaves.
capabilities: Set default date, time, and number formats
Configure default language and timezone
Adjust notification preferences
Manage system-wide feature toggles
